description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a double-door entryway, flanked by four-paned windows, and is enclosed by a wooden fence and gate. The house has a small front yard with a paved walkway, green lawn, and a pair of green bins near the entrance. The side yard includes a patio area with a round table and chairs, also enclosed by a wooden fence. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on all visible sides, and the roof is flat with visible interior room divisions. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on practicality and urban living.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with a patio and entry gate. The facade is orderly and urban, with a double-door entrance and green bins by the walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-door entry, four windows, fenced yard, green bins, and paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, single window, and fenced patio area with a round table and chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying six windows in symmetrical rows and the flat roof with visible room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows and a clear view of the fenced yard and patio area.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with no porch, flush to the facade, accessed by a paved walkway and enclosed by a wooden fence and gate.
